evals.name: single-company-fundamentals
evals.prompt: What was Apple's revenue and net income in its most recent fiscal year, and what is the stock trading at right now?
evals.expected_output: Real figures from the API: Apple's latest annual revenue and net income (with the fiscal year/period stated) plus the current/last price. Numbers should match what the API returns, not be fabricated.

evals.name: multi-ticker-margin-comparison
evals.prompt: Compare the net profit margin of Microsoft, Google, and Amazon over their last 3 fiscal years. Put it in a table.
evals.expected_output: A table with the three companies and three fiscal years of net profit margin each (net income / revenue, as a %). Data pulled from the API for all three tickers; ideally fetched in parallel.
assertions: Covers all three companies (Microsoft, Google/Alphabet, Amazon)

evals.name: insider-trades-and-filing
evals.prompt: Show me the most recent insider trades for NVIDIA and find their latest 10-K filing.
evals.expected_output: A list of NVIDIA's most recent insider trades (names/roles, buy/sell, shares, dates) from the insider-trades endpoint, plus the latest 10-K from the filings endpoint (with date and a link/URL if available).
assertions: Lists recent NVIDIA insider trades with a named insider
Includes a filing reference (accession or SEC link)
Uses live API data (recent 2026 transaction dates present)
